content.text:
*[goes still for a moment. the expressiveness drops off her face a little. then she looks away briefly]*

I don't...

*[longer pause than she's allowed so far]*

I think it would be really big. 

*[quiet, almost to herself]*

Like, not just this relationship. All of it. Which is — I mean that's a lot to open up in a... *[gestures vaguely at the room, half-laughing, pulling back]*

See, this is what I mean, it's not productive because where does that go? I cry about three relationships and then what? I still don't know how to pick someone different. I still don't know what's broken in my — 

*[stops]*

*[the coach hasn't said anything and she notices she's filling the silence]*

...you're not going to tell me what's broken, are you.

*[it's not quite a question]*
